title: Acctim Kyle Digital Alarm Clock, Desk Clock, LCD Digital Display with White Backlight, Snooze Function, Volume Control (Jeep Grey)
features: DISPLAY FEATURES: Large LCD digital display with white push button backlight for easy reading in any lighting conditions
ALARM FUNCTIONS: Built-in snooze function allows extra rest time with adjustable volume control for the alarm
COMPACT DESIGN: 9.1 x 5.6cm - Sleek casing with rounded edges, perfect for bedside tables or desk placement
EASY CONTROLS: Simple button interface with SET, UP, DOWN, and VOL controls for straightforward operation
TIME FORMAT: 12 or 24-hour digital clock display available to suit your needs
description: Transform your mornings with the stylish Acctim Kyle Digital Alarm Clock in a variety of stunning finishes. This contemporary timepiece features a clear LCD digital display with a convenient white backlight, making it easy to check the time even in low-light conditions. The practical snooze function gives you those precious extra minutes of rest when needed, while the adjustable volume control lets you set your alarm to your preferred sound level. With its sleek, rounded design and compact form factor, this clock seamlessly integrates into any bedroom or office décor. The intuitive button layout on the back panel allows for straightforward time and alarm settings. Whether you're using it as your daily wake-up companion or as a reliable timekeeper, this digital alarm clock combines functionality with modern aesthetics to help you stay punctual and organised.
